'''Qakkee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] from [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]].

==Biography==
He was known as the best wildlife hunter in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and his impressive record proved it. However, one day he encountered [[Sawtooth]], a legendary [[uller]] who made his residence in the [[Dead Forest (Kashyyyk)|Dead Forest]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. In the ensuing conflict, he was horribly mutilated by the giant creature. Left for dead, he was discovered by the locals and fitted with cybernetic legs and an arm. Defeated and shamed, he no longer hunted after the incident and lived in self-imposed exile at the [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He vowed vengeance on Sawtooth, but could not do it himself so he hired an individual to do it for him.

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] Qakkee commissioned an unknown [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to avenge the great hunter by killing Sawtooth, after proving their self by killing cannibal [[Dewback/Legends|dewbacks]], [[snorbal]]s, [[voritor lizard]]s, and a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]].

==Behind the scenes==
Qakkee appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
